title: Clone donor's innodb_validate_tablespace_paths = OFF leads ER_TABLESPACE_MISSING
description:
When Clone **donor** setting "innodb_validate_tablespace_paths = OFF", CLONE INSTANCE operation is wrong.

CLONE INSTANCE operation seems succeeding but SELECT statement fails by ER_TABLESPACE_MISSING (Error 1812)
How to repeat:
On doner-node (172.17.0.2:3306)

mysql> SELECT @@innodb_validate_tablespace_paths;
+------------------------------------+
| @@innodb_validate_tablespace_paths |
+------------------------------------+
|                                  0 |
+------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.05 sec)

mysql> INSTALL PLUGIN clone SONAME 'mysql_clone.so';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.07 sec)

mysql> CREATE DATABASE d1;
Query OK, 1 row affected (0.19 sec)

mysql> use d1
Database changed

mysql> CREATE TABLE t1 (num int PRIMARY KEY);
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.06 sec)

------

On recipient-node(172.17.0.3:3306) returns Error 1812,  both innodb_validate_tablespace_paths = ON and OFF.

mysql> SELECT @@innodb_validate_tablespace_paths;
+------------------------------------+
| @@innodb_validate_tablespace_paths |
+------------------------------------+
|                                  1 |
+------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.05 sec)

mysql> INSTALL PLUGIN clone SONAME 'mysql_clone.so';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.01 sec)

mysql> SET GLOBAL clone_valid_donor_list = '172.17.0.2:3306';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> CLONE INSTANCE FROM root@172.17.0.2:3306 IDENTIFIED BY '';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (2.01 sec)

-- After restart,

mysql> SELECT * FROM d1.t1;
ERROR 1812 (HY000): Tablespace is missing for table `d1`.`t1`.

In recipient-node's error log.

2021-01-04T06:47:54.626934Z 1 [System] [MY-013576] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has started.
2021-01-04T06:47:55.163934Z 1 [System] [MY-013577] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has ended.
2021-01-04T06:47:55.326973Z 1 [Warning] [MY-012351] [InnoDB] Tablespace 2, name 'd1/t1', file './d1/t1.ibd' is missing!
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM t2);
CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (num INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
